command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2rp6zCMfN7Vv5FK.root --database AV298FS8t5SaTurBBRqhgQ --execute 
INSERT INTO clients (leadId, source, name, email, phone, company, tags, isConverted, totalBookings)
SELECT l.id, 'lead', l.name, l.email, COALESCE(l.phone, ''), COALESCE(l.company, ''), JSON_ARRAY(), 0, 0
FROM leads l
LEFT JOIN clients c ON c.email = l.email
WHERE c.id IS NULL;

SELECT id, name, email, source, leadId FROM clients;
